title: cornus capitata var. angustata
intro: Cornus capitata var. angustata is a type of flowering plant commonly known as the Chinese dogwood or narrow-leaved dogwood, belonging to the Cornaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Cornus capitata var. angustata include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Cornus capitata var. angustata is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
